name: @chart-review/mcp-core-ner
description: Pure handler functions for the chart_review_ner MCP server. Parallel to mcp-core but exposes the 4 read-only ontology tools (list_entity_types / get_concept_tree / normalize_to_ontology / locate_in_source) and 3 write tools (set_span_label / set_span_status / get_span_review_state). Decoupled from transport SDKs; the anthropic and stdio adapters wrap these.
